mapper.insert: INSERT INTO promotion_details_summary ( date, promotion_id, promotion_name, platform, country, drama_id, drama_name, account_id, account_name, balance, campaign_name, cost, speed, roi, user_count, recharge_amount, profit, order_count, first_recharge_count, first_recharge_rate, repeat_recharge_count, impressions, cpm, avg_recharge_per_user ) VALUES ( #{date}, #{promotionId}, #{promotionName}, #{platform}, #{country}, #{dramaId}, #{dramaName}, #{accountId}, #{accountName}, #{balance}, #{campaignName}, #{cost}, #{speed}, #{roi}, #{userCount}, #{rechargeAmount}, #{profit}, #{orderCount}, #{firstRechargeCount}, #{firstRechargeRate}, #{repeatRechargeCount}, #{impressions}, #{cpm}, #{avgRechargePerUser} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE promotion_name = VALUES(promotion_name), platform = VALUES(platform), country = VALUES(country), drama_id = VALUES(drama_id), drama_name = VALUES(drama_name), account_id = VALUES(account_id), account_name = VALUES(account_name), balance = VALUES(balance), campaign_name = VALUES(campaign_name), cost = VALUES(cost), speed = VALUES(speed), roi = VALUES(roi), user_count = VALUES(user_count), recharge_amount = VALUES(recharge_amount), profit = VALUES(profit), order_count = VALUES(order_count), first_recharge_count = VALUES(first_recharge_count), first_recharge_rate = VALUES(first_recharge_rate), repeat_recharge_count = VALUES(repeat_recharge_count), impressions = VALUES(impressions), cpm = VALUES(cpm), avg_recharge_per_user = VALUES(avg_recharge_per_user), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE promotion_details_summary SET promotion_name = #{promotionName}, platform = #{platform}, country = #{country}, drama_id = #{dramaId}, drama_name = #{dramaName}, account_id = #{accountId}, account_name = #{accountName}, balance = #{balance}, campaign_name = #{campaignName}, cost = #{cost}, speed = #{speed}, roi = #{roi}, user_count = #{userCount}, recharge_amount = #{rechargeAmount}, profit = #{profit}, order_count = #{orderCount}, first_recharge_count = #{firstRechargeCount}, first_recharge_rate = #{firstRechargeRate}, repeat_recharge_count = #{repeatRechargeCount}, impressions = #{impressions}, cpm = #{cpm}, avg_recharge_per_user = #{avgRechargePerUser} WHERE date = #{date} AND promotion_id = #{promotionId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM promotion_details_summary WHERE date = #{date} AND promotion_id = #{promotionId} LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM promotion_details_summary
ORDER BY date DESC, promotion_id ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost), 0) AS cost, COALESCE(AVG(speed), 0) AS speed, COALESCE(SUM(user_count), 0) AS userCount, COALESCE(SUM(recharge_amount), 0) AS rechargeAmount, COALESCE(SUM(profit), 0) AS profit, COALESCE(SUM(order_count), 0) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(first_recharge_count), 0) AS firstRechargeCount, COALESCE(SUM(repeat_recharge_count), 0) AS repeatRechargeCount, COALESCE(SUM(impressions), 0) AS impressions FROM promotion_details_summary

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(`date`, '%m-%d') AS `time`, COALESCE(SUM(profit), 0) AS profit FROM promotion_details_summary
GROUP BY `date` ORDER BY `date` ASC

SELECT DISTINCT promotion_id FROM promotion_details_summary
ORDER BY promotion_id ASC
